```diff
+                         &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                           TTFB (s)
+                         &lt;/h3&gt;
+                         &lt;ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}&gt;
+                           &lt;BarChart
+                             data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                               (s) =&gt; ({
+                                 provider: s.run,
+                                 value: s.ttfb,
+                               })
+                             )}
+                             margin={{ top: 5, right: 30, left: 20, bottom: 5 }}
+                           &gt;
+                             &lt;CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" /&gt;
+                             &lt;XAxis
+                               dataKey="provider"
+                               tick={{ fontSize: 12 }}
+                               angle={-45}
+                               textAnchor="end"
+                               height={80}
+                             /&gt;
+                             &lt;YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 12 }} /&gt;
+                             &lt;Tooltip /&gt;
+                             &lt;Bar dataKey="value" fill="currentColor" /&gt;
+                           &lt;/BarChart&gt;
+                         &lt;/ResponsiveContainer&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                     {/* Row 3: Processing Time */}
+                     &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                       {/* Processing Time Chart */}
+                       &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                         &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                           Processing Time (s)
+                         &lt;/h3&gt;
+                         &lt;ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}&gt;
+                           &lt;BarChart
+                             data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                               (s) =&gt; ({
+                                 provider: s.run,
+                                 value: s.processing_time,
+                               })
+                             )}
+                             margin={{ top: 5, right: 30, left: 20, bottom: 5 }}
+                           &gt;
+                             &lt;CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" /&gt;
+                             &lt;XAxis
+                               dataKey="provider"
+                               tick={{ fontSize: 12 }}
+                               angle={-45}
+                               textAnchor="end"
+                               height={80}
+                             /&gt;
+                             &lt;YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 12 }} /&gt;
+                             &lt;Tooltip /&gt;
+                             &lt;Bar dataKey="value" fill="currentColor" /&gt;
+                           &lt;/BarChart&gt;
+                         &lt;/ResponsiveContainer&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
  
            {/* Outputs Tab */}
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---



---


## Changes Made:

1. **Installed recharts** — Added the recharts library for React charts
2. **Removed the image section** — Removed the `leaderboard_metrics_path` image display
3. **Created charts from data** — Generated bar charts from `leaderboard_summary` data
4. **All metrics plotted** — Charts for:
   - WER
   - String Similarity
   - LLM Judge Score
   - TTFB (s)
   - Processing Time (s)
5. **Layout** — 2 metrics per row:
   - Row 1: WER and String Similarity
   - Row 2: LLM Judge Score and TTFB
   - Row 3: Processing Time (single chart in a 2-column grid)

Each chart compares providers (runs) for that metric using bar charts. Charts are responsive, styled to match the component, and include tooltips. The X-axis labels are angled for readability.

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 23, lines removed: undefined

```diff
@@ -76,4 +76,27 @@
    "sarvam",
  ];
+ 
+ // Pastel color palette for providers
+ const pastelColors = [
+   "#A8D5E2", // Light blue
+   "#F4A5AE", // Light pink
+   "#B5E5CF", // Light green
+   "#FFD3A5", // Light orange
+   "#C7B9FF", // Light purple
+   "#FFE5B4", // Light peach
+   "#B8E6B8", // Light mint
+   "#E6B8E6", // Light lavender
+   "#B8D4E6", // Light sky blue
+   "#FFB8D4", // Light rose
+ ];
+ 
+ // Generate color mapping for providers
+ const getProviderColorMap = (providerNames: string[]): Map&lt;string, string&gt; =&gt; {
+   const colorMap = new Map&lt;string, string&gt;();
+   providerNames.forEach((provider, index) =&gt; {
+     colorMap.set(provider, pastelColors[index % pastelColors.length]);
+   });
+   return colorMap;
+ };
  
  export function SpeechToTextEvaluation() {
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
-                   &lt;/div&gt;
-                 )}
+                       {/* Row 3: Processing Time */}
+                       &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6"&gt;
+                         {/* Processing Time Chart */}
+                         &lt;div className="border rounded-xl p-4 bg-muted/10"&gt;
+                           &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-4"&gt;
+                             Processing Time (s)
+                           &lt;/h3&gt;
+                           &lt;ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}&gt;
+                             &lt;BarChart
+                               data={evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                 (s) =&gt; ({
+                                   provider: s.run,
+                                   value: s.processing_time,
+                                 })
+                               )}
+                               margin={{
+                                 top: 5,
+                                 right: 30,
+                                 left: 20,
+                                 bottom: 80,
+                               }}
+                             &gt;
+                               &lt;CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" /&gt;
+                               &lt;XAxis
+                                 dataKey="provider"
+                                 tick={{
+                                   fontSize: 13,
+                                   fill: "currentColor",
+                                   fontWeight: 500,
+                                 }}
+                                 angle={-45}
+                                 textAnchor="end"
+                                 height={100}
+                               /&gt;
+                               &lt;YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 12 }} /&gt;
+                               &lt;Tooltip /&gt;
+                               &lt;Bar dataKey="value"&gt;
+                                 {evaluationResult.leaderboard_summary.map(
+                                   (entry, index) =&gt; (
+                                     &lt;Cell
+                                       key={&#96;cell-${index}&#96;}
+                                       fill={colorMap.get(entry.run) || "#A8D5E2"}
+                                     /&gt;
+                                   )
+                                 )}
+                               &lt;/Bar&gt;
+                             &lt;/BarChart&gt;
+                           &lt;/ResponsiveContainer&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   );
+                 })()}
              &lt;/div&gt;
            )}
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---



---


## Changes Made:

1. **Added Cell import** — Imported `Cell` from recharts to color individual bars.

2. **Created color mapping function** — Added `getProviderColorMap()` that assigns consistent pastel colors to each provider using a palette of 10 pastel colors.

3. **Updated all charts** — Each chart now:
   - Uses `Cell` components to color bars by provider
   - Uses the same color for each provider across all charts
   - Uses pastel colors from the palette

4. **Improved provider name visibility**:
   - Increased font size from 12px to 13px
   - Added `fontWeight: 500`
   - Increased bottom margin from 5px to 80px
   - Increased X-axis height from 80px to 100px

Each provider now has a consistent color across all charts, and provider names on the X-axis are more visible with larger, bolder text.

---



---


Removed the hardcoded task ID. The temporary `useEffect` that polled with a hardcoded task ID on mount has been removed.

The component now only starts polling when a user clicks "Evaluate", which triggers `handleEvaluate` and creates a new evaluation task. No automatic polling on mount.
